Title: Verify backend liveness endpoint
Preconditions: Dev stack is running (docker compose up)
Test Steps: 1. Open terminal or browser to GET http://localhost:8080/health
Expected Result: Response: {"status": "ok"} with HTTP 200

Title: Verify backend readiness endpoint
Preconditions: Dev stack is running with PostgreSQL accessible
Test Steps: 1. Open terminal or browser to GET http://localhost:8080/health/ready
Expected Result: Response: {"status": "ok", "database": "connected"} with HTTP 200

Title: Verify backend component health
Preconditions: Dev stack is running
Test Steps: 1. Open terminal or browser to GET http://localhost:8080/health/components
Expected Result: Response contains component status breakdown with HTTP 200

Title: Verify dashboard is serving
Preconditions: Dev stack is running
Expected Result: Dashboard login page loads with no browser console errors

Title: Login with valid owner credentials
Preconditions: Seed data has been applied (make seed)
Expected Result: Response returns HTTP 200 with access_token, user object containing id/name/email/role_id/role_name, and sets httpOnly cookie

Title: Login with invalid password
Preconditions: Seed data applied
Expected Result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized with error message

Title: Login with non-existent email
Preconditions: Seed data applied
Expected Result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized with error message

Title: Get current user (auth/me)
Preconditions: User is logged in with valid JWT cookie
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with user object including resolved permissions list

Title: Get current user without auth
Preconditions: No authentication
Test Steps: 1. GET http://localhost:8080/api/v1/auth/me without any cookie or header
Expected Result: HTTP 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden

Title: Refresh token
Preconditions: User has valid (or recently expired) access_token cookie
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with new access_token and updated cookie; user object returned

Title: Logout
Preconditions: User is currently logged in
Expected Result: HTTP 200; cookie is cleared or invalidated; subsequent /auth/me returns 401

Title: Access protected endpoint without login
Preconditions: No cookie/header present
Expected Result: HTTP 401

Title: List users
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with paginated list of users; seed user is present

Title: Create a new user (operator)
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; know a valid role_id (operator)
Expected Result: HTTP 201 or 200 with user object containing id, name, email, role_id

Title: Create user with duplicate email
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; email already exists
Expected Result: HTTP 409 Conflict with error message

Title: Get user by ID
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; user id from TC-USERS-002
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full user object

Title: Get non-existent user
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; a UUID that does not exist
Expected Result: HTTP 404 Not Found

Title: Update user details
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; user id from TC-USERS-002
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with updated user object; changes reflected on next GET

Title: Reset user password
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; user id from TC-USERS-002
Expected Result: HTTP 200; user can login with new password

Title: Reset user PIN
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; user id from TC-USERS-002
Expected Result: HTTP 200; user PIN updated

Title: Deactivate user
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; user id from TC-USERS-002 (not the owner)
Expected Result: HTTP 200; user status changes to DEACTIVATED; user cannot login

Title: List roles
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of 4 seed roles (owner, admin, manager, operator) with their permissions JSONB

Title: Get role by ID
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; know operator role_id
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full role object including permissions JSONB

Title: Create a new role
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; define permissions list
Expected Result: HTTP 201 or 200 with new role object

Title: Update role permissions
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; role id from TC-ROLES-003
Expected Result: HTTP 200; permissions updated

Title: Delete role (soft-delete)
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; role id from TC-ROLES-003, not assigned to any user
Expected Result: HTTP 200; role.deleted_at is set; role no longer appears in list

Title: Verify non-owner cannot grant finance permissions
Preconditions: Logged in as admin (non-owner role)
Expected Result: HTTP 403 when trying to assign finance:* or finance:view_transactions to a role

Title: List locations
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with at least 1 location ("MAIN" from seed)

Title: Get location by ID
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; location id from TC-LOC-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full location object including name, code, address, city, capacity, status

Title: Create a new location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 201 or 200 with new location object and ACTIVE status

Title: Update location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; location id from TC-LOC-003
Expected Result: HTTP 200; changes reflected on GET

Title: Deactivate location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; location id from TC-LOC-003
Expected Result: HTTP 200; location status changes to INACTIVE

Title: Assign operator to location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; operator user id; location id
Expected Result: HTTP 200; operator is linked via user_role_locations

Title: Remove operator from location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; operator was assigned in TC-LOC-006
Expected Result: HTTP 200; operator no longer linked to location

Title: Create rate for a location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; location id from TC-LOC-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200; rate created for the location/vehicle_type with specified first_hour/subsequent_hourly rates

Title: List rates for a location
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; location with rates from TC-RATES-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of rates for that location

Title: Update a rate
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; rate id from TC-RATES-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200; rate updated

Title: Prevent overlapping rate periods
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; location id; existing rate for CAR has effective_from 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31
Expected Result: HTTP 400 or 409 with error about overlapping effective dates

Title: Start a shift (operator)
Preconditions: Logged in as operator user; operator assigned to a location (TC-LOC-006)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with shift object containing status=OPEN, operator_id, location_id, started_at

Title: Start shift when one already open (auto-close)
Preconditions: Operator has an open shift from TC-SHIFT-001
Expected Result: Previous shift is auto-closed; new shift is returned with status=OPEN

Title: Get my open shift
Preconditions: Operator with an open shift (TC-SHIFT-001)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with open shift details

Title: Get my open shift (none)
Preconditions: Operator without an open shift
Expected Result: HTTP 404 with "no open shift"

Title: End a shift with cash handover
Preconditions: Operator has open shift (TC-SHIFT-001); shift has some transactions (skip to TC-SESS-payment first, or just verify the endpoint)
Expected Result: HTTP 200; shift status changes to CLOSED; end time set

Title: End shift with discrepancy
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; cash_handover does not match expected_cash
Expected Result: HTTP 200; shift status may be FLAGGED or discrepancy field is set

Title: Force-close a shift (manager)
Preconditions: Logged in as manager user; shift stuck in OPEN for another operator
Expected Result: HTTP 200; shift status changes to FORCE_CLOSED with reason and force_closed_by

Title: List shifts (filterable)
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; shifts exist from previous tests
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with paginated shift list

Title: Get shift by ID
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; shift id from TC-SHIFT-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full shift object including transactions (if any)

Title: Check-in a vehicle (CAR)
Preconditions: Operator has open shift (TC-SHIFT-001); location has rate for CAR (TC-RATES-001)
Expected Result: HTTP 200; response contains session with state=ACTIVE, plate normalized, location_id, operator_id

Title: Check-in a vehicle (MOTO)
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; location has rate for MOTO
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with session in ACTIVE state

Title: Check-in a vehicle (TRUCK)
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; location has rate for TRUCK
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with session in ACTIVE state

Title: Check-in without open shift
Preconditions: Operator has ended their shift (TC-SHIFT-005)
Expected Result: HTTP 400 with "NO_OPEN_SHIFT" error

Title: Check-in with duplicate plate (warning)
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; a session with same plate is already ACTIVE
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with session created AND duplicate_plate_warning=true

Title: Get active sessions list
Preconditions: Logged in as owner/manager; sessions exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of ACTIVE sessions; can filter by location

Title: Get session history
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; sessions exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of CLOSED sessions; pagination works

Title: Get session detail
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; session id from TC-SESS-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full session object including check_in_at, vehicle_type, plate

Title: Check-out vehicle (automatic fee)
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; session ACTIVE for >0 minutes (TC-SESS-001)
Expected Result: HTTP 200; session state changes to PENDING_PAYMENT or CLOSED; fee_amount calculated from rate snapshot

Title: Check-out with overridden fee
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; session is ACTIVE
Expected Result: HTTP 200; session uses provided fee_amount instead of calculated fee

Title: Cash payment (collect payment for checked-out session)
Preconditions: Session is in PENDING_PAYMENT or CLOSED state (from TC-SESS-009); operator has open shift
Expected Result: HTTP 200; transaction created with payment_method=CASH, receipt_number generated; session transitions to appropriate state

Title: Cash payment with change calculation
Preconditions: Session has fee_amount known; amount_tendered > fee_amount
Expected Result: HTTP 200; transaction includes correct change_amount = amount_tendered - fee_amount

Title: Digital payment
Preconditions: Session is checked in and checked out; operator open shift
Expected Result: HTTP 200; transaction with payment_method=DIGITAL, payment_reference saved

Title: List transactions
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; transactions exist from previous tests
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with paginated transaction list including all payment details

Title: Get transaction detail
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; transaction id from TC-PAY-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full transaction object including receipt_number, session details, fee breakdown

Title: Void a transaction (with PIN)
Preconditions: Logged in as manager; transaction exists (TC-PAY-001); know manager PIN
Expected Result: HTTP 200; transaction.voided=true; session state may revert to ACTIVE

Title: Void a transaction (wrong PIN)
Preconditions: Logged in as manager; transaction exists
Expected Result: HTTP 400/403 with invalid PIN error

Title: Create an incident (STUCK_AT_GATE)
Preconditions: Logged in as operator; optional session id from TC-SESS-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200; incident created with state=OPEN, type=STUCK_AT_GATE

Title: Create an incident (PAYMENT_DISPUTE) with session reference
Preconditions: Logged in as operator; transaction/session id from TC-PAY-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200; incident references the session

Title: Create an incident (OPERATOR_ERROR)
Preconditions: Logged in as operator
Expected Result: HTTP 200; incident created

Title: Create an incident (SYSTEM_DOWNTIME)
Preconditions: Logged in as operator
Expected Result: HTTP 200; incident created

Title: List incidents with filters
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; incidents exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with paginated list; filterable by type, state, location

Title: Get incident detail
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; incident id from TC-INC-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full incident object including notes count

Title: Add note to incident
Preconditions: Logged in as operator; incident id from TC-INC-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200; note added

Title: List notes for incident
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; incident with notes (TC-INC-007)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of notes

Title: Resolve incident (no adjustment)
Preconditions: Logged in as manager; incident id from TC-INC-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200; incident state changes to RESOLVED

Title: Resolve incident with adjustment (void transaction)
Preconditions: Logged in as manager; incident linked to a transaction; know manager PIN
Expected Result: HTTP 200; incident resolved AND transaction voided as part of resolution

Title: Void transaction via adjustments endpoint
Preconditions: Logged in as manager; transaction exists (TC-PAY-001); know manager PIN
Expected Result: HTTP 200; transaction voided

Title: Reassign session to different operator
Preconditions: Logged in as manager; session exists (TC-SESS-001); know manager PIN
Expected Result: HTTP 200; session operator_id updated

Title: List alerts
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; alerts may exist (from alert engine or test have a LONG_SESSION by waiting >24h)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with paginated alert list

Title: Get alert detail
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; alert id from TC-ALERT-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with full alert object

Title: Acknowledge an alert
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; alert id from TC-ALERT-001 in state TRIGGERED
Expected Result: HTTP 200; alert state changes to ACKNOWLEDGED

Title: Resolve an alert
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; alert id from TC-ALERT-003 in state ACKNOWLEDGED
Expected Result: HTTP 200; alert state changes to RESOLVED

Title: List alert configs
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of alert_configs (threshold configurations)

Title: Update alert config threshold
Preconditions: Logged in as owner; alert config id from TC-ALERT-005
Expected Result: HTTP 200; config threshold updated

Title: Daily revenue report (JSON)
Preconditions: Transactions exist (TC-PAY-001, TC-PAY-003); date range set
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with revenue breakdown by date, payment method, totals

Title: Daily revenue report (CSV)
Preconditions: Same data as TC-REP-001
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with Content-Type text/csv; CSV data downloadable

Title: Occupancy report
Preconditions: Sessions exist (TC-SESS-001, 002, 003)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with occupancy metrics (peak times, utilization)

Title: Vehicle breakdown report
Preconditions: Sessions of different vehicle types exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with count/percentage by vehicle_type (CAR, MOTO, TRUCK)

Title: Operator activity report
Preconditions: Shifts and sessions from operator exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with per-operator metrics (sessions handled, payments collected)

Title: Report with date range >90 days
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 400 with error about max 90-day range

Title: List backups
Preconditions: Backups have been run (or scheduled)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of backup records (may be empty initially)

Title: Run a manual backup
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: HTTP 200 or 202; backup record created; file exists on disk

Title: List audit logs
Preconditions: Activity has occurred (logins, user creation, sessions, etc.)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with paginated list of audit log entries showing action, actor_id, entity_type, timestamp

Title: Filter audit logs by action
Preconditions: Audit logs exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 filtered to matching actions only

Title: Export audit logs (CSV)
Preconditions: Audit logs exist
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with CSV content

Title: Batch sync (offline desktop)
Preconditions: Backend is running; operator has open shift; offline sync operations in queue
Test Steps: 1. Build a batch payload with check_in, check_out, payment items
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with sync results (items processed, any errors)

Title: List sync conflicts
Preconditions: Conflicts exist from TC-SYNC-001 (due to version/state mismatches)
Expected Result: HTTP 200 with list of sync conflicts

Title: Resolve a sync conflict
Preconditions: Conflict id exists from TC-SYNC-002
Expected Result: HTTP 200; conflict resolved

Title: Desktop app launches
Preconditions: Electron app is built and working; backend is running
Expected Result: Application window opens with login screen displaying email and password fields

Title: Desktop login with valid credentials
Preconditions: Backend is running with seed data
Expected Result: User is authenticated; token stored; navigates to location selection screen

Title: Desktop login with invalid credentials
Preconditions: Backend running; no valid session
Expected Result: Error message displayed; stays on login screen

Title: Desktop select location (owner)
Preconditions: Logged in as owner on desktop
Expected Result: Location list shown; select a location; app navigates to operator dashboard

Title: Desktop dashboard display
Preconditions: Location selected on desktop
Expected Result: Dashboard shows relevant info (open shift status, today stats)

Title: Desktop check-in vehicle
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; desktop logged in with location selected
Expected Result: Session created; confirmation shown; plate/type visible

Title: Desktop check-in without open shift
Preconditions: Desktop logged in; operator has no open shift
Expected Result: Error message: operator must start a shift first

Title: Desktop check-out vehicle
Preconditions: Operator has open shift; an ACTIVE session exists
Expected Result: Fee calculated and displayed; option to override fee or proceed to payment

Title: Desktop cash payment
Preconditions: Session checked out; fee displayed
Expected Result: Payment screen shows fee; enter amount tendered; change displayed; receipt shown on Success screen

Title: Desktop digital payment
Preconditions: Session checked out; fee displayed
Expected Result: Transaction created as DIGITAL with reference; Success screen shows receipt

Title: Desktop session history
Preconditions: Sessions exist for the location
Expected Result: List of past sessions shown with plate, time, fee, status; filterable

Title: Desktop incident report
Preconditions: Operator logged in and location selected
Expected Result: Incident created; type, description, optional session reference recorded

Title: Desktop offline check-in (queued)
Preconditions: Desktop is in offline mode (disconnect network)
Expected Result: Operation queued locally; no error shown to operator

Title: Desktop sync after reconnect
Preconditions: Operations queued from TC-DSK-013; network reconnected
Expected Result: Queued operations synced to backend; confirmation shown

Title: Dashboard login page
Preconditions: Dev stack running; browser to http://localhost:3000
Expected Result: Login form renders with email and password fields; submit button

Title: Dashboard login success
Preconditions: Backend running with seed data
Expected Result: Redirected to /select page (location selection)

Title: Dashboard login failure
Preconditions: Backend running
Expected Result: Error message shown; stays on login page

Title: Dashboard location selection
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: List of locations displayed; select "MAIN"

Title: Dashboard location home page
Preconditions: Location selected
Expected Result: Location dashboard loads with navigation sidebar; shows active sessions count, today summary

Title: Dashboard navigation - all menu items
Preconditions: Location selected; logged in as owner
Expected Result: Each page loads without errors; correct page title shown

Title: Dashboard active sessions page
Preconditions: At least one session is ACTIVE
Expected Result: Table shows active sessions with plate, vehicle type, check-in time

Title: Dashboard session history page
Preconditions: CLOSED sessions exist
Expected Result: Paginated table with session data and search/filter options

Title: Dashboard transactions page
Preconditions: Transactions exist
Expected Result: Transaction list with receipt numbers, amounts, payment methods

Title: Dashboard shifts page
Preconditions: Shifts exist
Expected Result: Shift list with operator, status, start/end times

Title: Dashboard users page
Preconditions: Logged in as owner/admin
Expected Result: User management table; ability to add/edit/deactivate users

Title: Dashboard roles page
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: Role list; ability to create/edit/delete roles

Title: Dashboard locations page
Preconditions: Logged in as owner
Expected Result: Location management; can view all locations, create/edit/deactivate

Title: Dashboard rates page
Preconditions: Location selected
Expected Result: Rate table by vehicle type; ability to add/edit rates

Title: Dashboard incidents page
Preconditions: Incidents exist
Expected Result: Incident list filterable by type and status

Title: Dashboard alerts page
Preconditions: Alerts exist (or config page)
Expected Result: Alert list with acknowledge/resolve actions

Title: Dashboard reports page
Preconditions: Transactions/sessions exist
Expected Result: Revenue, occupancy, vehicle breakdown, and operator activity reports render with charts/tables

Title: Dashboard audit logs page
Preconditions: Activity exists
Expected Result: Paginated audit trail with filters and export option

Title: Dashboard health page
Preconditions: Backend running
Expected Result: Component status display; DB connection status shown

Title: Dashboard backups page
Preconditions: Backup exists or can be triggered
Expected Result: Backup list with "Run Backup" button

Title: Dashboard sync conflicts page
Preconditions: Sync conflicts exist (rare in dev)
Expected Result: Conflict list with resolve actions

Title: Permission enforcement - operator cannot create users
Preconditions: Logged in as operator
Expected Result: HTTP 403 on POST /users

Title: Permission enforcement - operator cannot view finance reports
Preconditions: Logged in as operator
Expected Result: HTTP 403 on GET /reports/daily-revenue

Title: Permission enforcement - admin cannot grant finance perms
Preconditions: Logged in as admin
Expected Result: HTTP 403 when creating/updating role with finance: permission

Title: Complete end-to-end flow
Preconditions: All preconditions met for shift/session/payment
Expected Result: End-to-end flow completes with correct audit trail

Title: Verify dashboard WIB timezone rendering
Preconditions: Timestamps in DB are UTC
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to any page showing timestamps
Expected Result: Timestamps display in Asia/Jakarta (UTC+7) timezone
